dashboard.label: Registry Persistence Monitor
dashboard.description: Detect suspicious registry modifications indicative of persistence

search.query: index=endpoint EventCode=13 | eval registry_path=TargetObject | where match(registry_path, ".*\\\\Run\\\\.*") OR match(registry_path, ".*\\\\RunOnce\\\\.*") | stats count

index=endpoint EventCode=13 | eval reg_type=case(match(TargetObject, ".*\\\\Run\\\\.*"), "Run Key", match(TargetObject, ".*\\\\RunOnce\\\\.*"), "RunOnce Key", match(TargetObject, ".*\\\\Services\\\\.*"), "Services Key", 1=1, "Other") | where reg_type!="Other" | stats count by reg_type
index=endpoint EventCode=13 TargetObject="*\\Run\\*" OR TargetObject="*\\RunOnce\\*" | fields _time, Computer, Image, User, TargetObject, Details | sort - _time
